utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey ! Guess what I got for your wedding !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: A freakish thin date with a hanger for her head ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No . Rachel hooked me up with a tux ! But not just any tux , Batman tux !

emotion_cause.span: 3_Rachel hooked me up with a tux ! But not just any tux , Batman tux !
3_Rachel hooked me up with a tux ! But not just any tux , Batman tux !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is right ! Made expressly for Val Kilmer and worn by him in the hit film ... that Batman film he was in .

emotion_cause.span: 5_Made expressly for Val Kilmer and worn by him in the hit film ... that Batman film he was in .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You can not wear that ! I am wearing the famous tux ! James Bond tux !

emotion_cause.span: 8_If you wear that you will make mine less special .
6_You can not wear that ! I am wearing the famous tux ! James Bond tux !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So ... If you wear that you will make mine less special .

emotion_cause.span: 8_If you wear that you will make mine less special .
